commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: Human review is needed for the fail-closed delivery semantics and contributor-supplied real behavior proof; an automated repair of the oversized read alone would not make the branch merge-ready.; Needs attention: The runtime direction is security-positive, but the patch still has an availability-sensitive oversized read and publishes operator-local paths in committed docs.; Review finding: [P1] Reject oversized arti... (sha=763fa0cf1f0ae9214c14802e13e26a8ac68181b1)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds child-result contract/quarantine handling, active-task/session audit state, memory sanitizers, mock-provider authorization gates, Vitest process hygiene, replay fixtures, and rollout docs across agents, gateway protocol, scripts, bundled plugins, and tests.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: an artifact larger than maxVerifiedArtifactBytes reaches the stat.size branch and is read with fs.readFileSync, and legacy PASS text maps to UNVERIFIED before delivery is marked ineligible. I did not execute tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: Human review is needed for the fail-closed delivery semantics and contributor-supplied real behavior proof; an automated repair of the oversized read alone would not make the branch merge-ready.

target.title: Harden runtime session and subagent event handling
target.body:
## Summary
- add session/subagent child-result quarantine, audit, and durable active-task/runtime state contracts
- harden malformed child result handling, compaction successor context, active-memory, and mock provider authorization gates
- add replay fixtures, rollout/release readiness docs, and scoped vitest process hygiene gates

## Verification
- git diff --check origin/main..HEAD
- changed-path secret scan over 95 changed paths
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/active-memory/index.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/providers/mock-openai/server.test.ts src/agents/subagent-announce.format.e2e.test.ts src/agents/subagent-announce.test.ts --reporter=dot (4 files / 251 tests passed)
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/agents/openclaw-tools.sessions.test.ts --reporter=dot (2 files / 36 tests passed)

No package/lock/generated-dist changes. No gateway restart/config/cron/credential changes.

## Real behavior proof

After-fix evidence was collected from a real local OpenClaw source checkout rebased on upstream `main` (`origin/main` `9657b8e8ce`, branch head `d0c1b56d0c`) in `/root/.openclaw/worktrees/openclaw-runtime-hardening-20260517`.

Terminal proof from the real checkout:

```text
source after latest rebase:
## runtime-hardening-20260517
HEAD d0c1b56d0c
base 9657b8e8ce
ahead_behind 0 1
secret_scan_ok paths=95
source_latest_rebase_pushed
```

Runtime-focused verification from the same checkout:

```text
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/active-memory/index.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/providers/mock-openai/server.test.ts src/agents/subagent-announce.format.e2e.test.ts src/agents/subagent-announce.test.ts --reporter=dot
Test Files 4 passed (4)
Tests 251 passed (251)

node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/agents/openclaw-tools.sessions.test.ts --reporter=dot
Test Files 2 passed (2)
Tests 36 passed (36)
```

Additional real setup checks:

```text
git diff --check origin/main..HEAD: passed
changed-path secret scan over 95 changed paths: passed
package/lock/generated-dist changes: none
live gateway restart/config/cron/credential changes: none
```
target.author: botnotstrawberry
